variants: As a member of the Desert Glass Walkers, Jed Wain engages deeply in cultural anthropology and its applications. Jed continues to be a pivotal figure in both his professional community and broader academic circles.

With these accomplishments, Jed continues to push the boundaries of anthropological study.
